vllm.title: Add support for baichuan
vllm.author: codethazine
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Closes #303
Should be merged after #364 - as the model requires its remote tokenizer to run correctly

vllm.title: fix max seq len
vllm.author: LiuXiaoxuanPKU
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR tries to remove the definition of max sequence length. A response is capped only when it's longer than max_model_len. A request is ignored if the input prompt is longer than min(max_model_len, max_num_batched_tokens).  This should fix #446.
